project_type: Expo/React Native mobile app (fork of opencode-mobile)
test_framework: Playwright E2E (tests/e2e/), fake server (tests/fake-opencode/), static checks (lint + typecheck)
build_command: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
verification_instructions: 1. npm run lint 2. npm run typecheck -- these are the baseline validation per AGENTS.md
environment_constraints: Full internet access. No Android SDK for native builds. Validation is lint + typecheck.
contribution_requirements: Follow layer architecture in AGENTS.md: providers own domain state, lib owns protocol, components own presentation. Keep screens thin. No fetch logic in components.
key_patterns: Colors exported from constants/theme.ts with light/dark palettes. Paper theme in constants/paper-theme.ts maps Colors to react-native-paper MD3Theme. Client construction in lib/opencode/client.ts with OpencodeConnectionSettings type. App config in app.config.ts. All OpenCode branding references use 'OpenCode' string.
directory_structure: app/ - Expo Router pages (tabs: index/chat, workspace, settings). components/ - UI (chat/, settings/, ui/). providers/ - domain state/orchestration. lib/opencode/ - API client layer. constants/ - theme + paper-theme. assets/images/ - icons and splash.
